trans-unit.source: We could not complete this action. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: No pudimos completar esta accion. Intentalo de nuevo mas tarde.

trans-unit.source: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
trans-unit.target: Tu sesion ha expirado. Inicia sesion nuevamente.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: No tienes permisos para realizar esta accion.

trans-unit.source: The requested resource was not found.
trans-unit.target: No se encontro el recurso solicitado.

trans-unit.source: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.
trans-unit.target: La solicitud entra en conflicto con el estado actual del recurso.

trans-unit.source: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: Ocurrio un problema en el servidor. Intentalo mas tarde.

trans-unit.source: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: El servicio no esta disponible temporalmente. Intentalo mas tarde.

trans-unit.note: API error match not found message

trans-unit.source: This quiz is no longer available.
trans-unit.target: Este quiz ya no esta disponible.
trans-unit.note: API error match not available message

trans-unit.source: This quiz is not active yet.
trans-unit.target: Este quiz aun no esta activo.
trans-unit.note: API error match not active message

trans-unit.source: You already have an active attempt for this quiz.
trans-unit.target: Ya tienes un intento activo para este quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error active attempt exists message

trans-unit.source: The quiz attempt was not found.
trans-unit.target: No se encontro el intento del quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt not found message

trans-unit.source: This attempt has already been submitted.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt already submitted message

trans-unit.source: The time for this attempt has expired.
trans-unit.target: El tiempo para este intento ha expirado.

trans-unit.source: This attempt is not in progress.
trans-unit.target: Este intento no esta en progreso.
trans-unit.note: API error attempt not in progress message
API error question not found message

trans-unit.source: The selected option was not found.
trans-unit.target: No se encontro la opcion seleccionada.
trans-unit.note: API error option not found message

trans-unit.source: Please select an answer before continuing.
trans-unit.target: Selecciona una respuesta antes de continuar.

trans-unit.note: API error invalid answer payload message

trans-unit.target: La fecha de respuesta es requerida.
trans-unit.note: API error answered at required message

trans-unit.source: You have reached the maximum number of attempts for this quiz.
trans-unit.target: Alcanzaste el numero maximo de intentos para este quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error max attempts reached message
API error course not found message

trans-unit.target: El banco de preguntas esta vacio.
trans-unit.note: API error question bank empty message

trans-unit.source: The quiz could not be created.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo crear el quiz.
trans-unit.note: API error quiz creation failed message

trans-unit.source: The match could not be created.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo crear el match.
trans-unit.note: API error match creation failed message

trans-unit.target: La configuracion del examen es invalida.
trans-unit.note: API error invalid exam configuration message

trans-unit.source: The exam could not be published.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo publicar el examen.
trans-unit.note: API error publish exam failed message

trans-unit.source: The content could not be uploaded.
trans-unit.target: No se pudo subir el contenido.
trans-unit.note: API error content upload failed message

trans-unit.source: The selected file type is not supported.
trans-unit.target: El tipo de archivo seleccionado no es compatible.
trans-unit.note: API error unsupported file type message
API error dialog status code label

trans-unit.source: We could not load this quiz right now.
trans-unit.target: No pudimos cargar este quiz en este momento.

trans-unit.source: Create, publish and evaluate your students' performance instantly
trans-unit.target: Crea, publica y evalúa el desempeño de tus estudiantes al instante

trans-unit.source: Generate quizzes from your classes using artificial intelligence
trans-unit.target: Genera quizzes de tus clases con inteligencia artificial

trans-unit.note: Student exam start page back button aria label
Student exam questions back button aria label
Student exam back to exams button

trans-unit.source: Something went wrong uploading your content. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Ocurrio un problema al subir tu contenido. Intentalo nuevamente.

trans-unit.note: Upload content submit button loading label

trans-unit.target: Formato de archivo invalido. Formatos aceptados: .

trans-unit.source: File is too large. Maximum size is 500MB.
trans-unit.target: El archivo es demasiado grande. El tamano maximo es 500MB.

trans-unit.source: You cannot leave while this attempt is in progress. Please complete it first.
trans-unit.target: No puedes salir mientras este intento esta en curso. Completalo primero.

trans-unit.note: Attempt history in progress date label

trans-unit.target: Cambiar modo de vista del historial de calificaciones
trans-unit.note: Grade history view mode toggle aria label
Grade history table mode toggle label

trans-unit.target: Modo de vista del historial de calificaciones
trans-unit.note: Grade history view mode toggle aria label
Sidebar nav student grade history label
Student dashboard available quizzes section title
Student dashboard recent quizzes section title
Aria label for user menu button
User menu signed in as label

trans-unit.target: Abrir o cerrar menú de navegación
trans-unit.note: Aria label to toggle navigation sidebar
Aria label to close sidebar overlay
Back to dashboard button aria label
File drop zone tap to select

trans-unit.source: Students will be able to take auto-generated quizzes from this class content
trans-unit.target: Los alumnos podrán tomar quizzes auto generados del contenido de esta clase

trans-unit.source: At the end of the review the student sees what they got right
trans-unit.target: Al finalizar el repaso el alumno ve qué acertó

trans-unit.source: Questions are shuffled in each review
trans-unit.target: Las preguntas se mezclan en cada repaso

trans-unit.source: Something went wrong uploading your content. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Algo salió mal al cargar tu contenido. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.

trans-unit.note: Upload content submit button loading label

trans-unit.target: Formato de archivo inválido. Formatos aceptados: .

trans-unit.source: File is too large. Maximum size is 500MB.
trans-unit.target: El archivo es demasiado grande. El tamaño máximo es de 500MB.

trans-unit.note: Grade card other attempts count label
Grade card other attempts section heading
Aria label to switch to light mode
Aria label to switch to dark mode

trans-unit.source: Create and publish quizzes ready for your classes
trans-unit.target: Crea y publica quizzes listos para tus clases

trans-unit.source: Evaluate and analyze your students' performance
trans-unit.target: Evalúa y analiza el desempeño de tus estudiantes

trans-unit.note: Exam question card added to exam label
Exam question card add to exam label
Exam question card remove from bank label

trans-unit.source: Enter a duration between 1 and 300 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Ingresá una duración entre 1 y 300 minutos.
Mezcla las preguntas para cada intento

trans-unit.note: Exam step config shuffle enabled label
Exam step config shuffle enable label
Exam step config available from label
Exam step config available from error
Exam step config available until label
Exam step config available until error

trans-unit.source: The end date must be after the start date.
trans-unit.target: La fecha de cierre debe ser posterior a la de inicio.
trans-unit.note: Exam step config date range error
Exam step info title required error

trans-unit.source: Title must be at least 3 characters.
trans-unit.target: El título debe tener al menos 3 caracteres.
trans-unit.note: Exam step info title minlength error

trans-unit.source: Ex: DDD concepts and hexagonal architecture...
trans-unit.target: Ej: Conceptos de DDD y arquitectura hexagonal...

trans-unit.note: Exam step info select classes label

trans-unit.source: Please select at least one class.
trans-unit.note: Exam step info no classes error
Exam step questions selected count label
Exam step questions max score label

trans-unit.source: No questions available for the selected classes.
trans-unit.target: No hay preguntas disponibles para las clases seleccionadas.

trans-unit.note: Teacher dashboard create exam button label
Teacher dashboard view exam bank link
Teacher dashboard publish exam button label
Exam step questions save to bank button aria label
Exam step questions save to bank button
Exam step config shuffle questions label

trans-unit.source: Questions will be shown in a random order for each student
trans-unit.target: Las preguntas se mostrarán en orden aleatorio para cada estudiante
trans-unit.note: Exam step config shuffle questions description
Exam step config shuffle options label

trans-unit.source: Answer options will be shown in a random order for each student
trans-unit.target: Las opciones de respuesta se mostrarán en orden aleatorio para cada estudiante
trans-unit.note: Exam step config shuffle options description
Exam step config duration required error

trans-unit.source: Duration must be at least 1 minute
trans-unit.target: La duración debe ser de al menos 1 minuto
trans-unit.note: Exam step config duration min error

trans-unit.target: La cantidad de reintentos es obligatoria
trans-unit.note: Exam step config retries required error

trans-unit.target: La fecha de inicio es obligatoria
trans-unit.note: Exam step config enabled from required error

trans-unit.target: La fecha de cierre es obligatoria
trans-unit.note: Exam step config enabled until required error

trans-unit.source: End date must be after start date
trans-unit.target: La fecha de cierre debe ser posterior a la de inicio
trans-unit.note: Exam step config date range error

trans-unit.source: No draft exams yet. Create an exam to get started.
trans-unit.target: Todavía no hay exámenes en borrador. Creá un examen para empezar.

trans-unit.note: Grade panel exam selector aria label
